allow: Bash(claude mcp add notebooklm npx notebooklm-mcp@latest)

feat\(config\): complete P0 and P1 agent toolkit setup

- #1 CLAUDE.md + layer rules \(L0-L6\)

- #3 ESLint layer boundary enforcer \(eslint-plugin-boundaries\)
- #4 dependency-cruiser validator \(7-layer architecture rules\)
- #5 Vitest test harness \(80% coverage thresholds, 90 tests passing\)
- #6 Git hooks pipeline \(husky + lint-staged\)
- #7 Core CI/CD pipeline \(ci.yml, pr-checks.yml\)
- #8 Widget scaffolding skill \(plop templates\)

P1 Agents \(8/9 complete\):
- #9 Ralph Loop harness \(.ralph/ + /ralph skill\)
- #10 Plop.js generators \(widget, module, store, event, schema\)
- #12 Playwright E2E agent \(canvas fixtures\)
- #13 Event bus test generator skill
- #14 Storybook widget stories
- #15 Supabase migration runner \(13 tables + RLS\)
- #16 Vercel preview deployer \(preview + production workflows\)
- #17 commitlint enforcer \(layer scopes\)

Remaining: #11 Architecture MCP Query Server \(deferred\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
